\tzpentry{ID3356}{Phonon Neural Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3356 introduces Phonon Neural Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} H_{ \text{phonon-neural}} = \hbar \sum_q \omega_q b_q^ \dagger b_q + \sum_{q,i} g_q (b_q^ \dagger + b_q) X_i \end{equation}
